message.content:
{"analysis":"The unzip command seems to have produced no output. Let me check if the extraction worked and try alternative approaches to get the file content.","plan":"1. Check if anything was extracted
2. Try using perl to manually parse the zip local file header and extract the stored data
3. The zip header at 1048578 shows compression method 0x0000 (stored), so the data should be directly readable","commands":[{"keystrokes":"ls -la /tmp/extracted2/ 2>/dev/null
","duration":0.1},{"keystrokes":"dd if=/tmp/carved2.zip bs=1 count=200 2>/dev/null | od -A x -t x1z
","duration":1.0},{"keystrokes":"perl -e 'local $/; open(F,"<",$ARGV[0]); $d=<F>; print length($d)," bytes\n"; $pos=0; while($pos < length($d)-4){ if(substr($d,$pos,4) eq "PK\x03\x04"){ my $h=substr($d,$pos,30); my @f=unpack("v10V2v2V",$h); printf "Local header at %d: ver=%d flags=%x comp=%d size=%d usize=%d namelen=%x extralen=%x\n",$pos,@f; last;} $pos++; }' /tmp/carved2.zip
","duration":1.0}]}
